summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Accounting Module (Plan Comptable Tunisien). All 21 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with hierarchical tree view, search, filtering, and CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper ObjectId serialization
System account protection working correctly (cannot delete, can only update notes)
Hierarchical tree structure properly implemented with parent-child relationships
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: 490 accounts seeded via Tunisian Chart of Accounts (SCE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting module (Plan Comptable Tunisien) fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_accounting_crud.py cover: list accounts, filter by type (equity/asset/liability/expense/income), search by code/name, CRUD operations, system account protection, validation.
